md_cleanup.append(f'- Actual reclaimed: `{actual_reclaimed_human}` ({actual_reclaimed_bytes} bytes)') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Protected Path Rules') for rule in protected_rules:     md_cleanup.append(f'- {rule}') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Explicit Protected Paths') for p in protected_explicit_sorted:     md_cleanup.append(f'- `{p}`') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Safe Garbage Cleanup') md_cleanup.append(f'- deleted_safe_garbage_count: `{len(safe_deleted_paths)}`') md_cleanup.append(f'- deleted_safe_garbage_bytes: `{safe_deleted_bytes}` (`{human(safe_deleted_bytes)}`)') for item in safe_deleted_paths[:200]:     md_cleanup.append(f"- `{item['path']}` ({human(item['bytes'])})") if len(safe_deleted_paths) > 200:     md_cleanup.append(f'- ... plus {len(safe_deleted_paths) - 200} more safe-garbage deletions') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Large-File Deduplication') md_cleanup.append(f'- reclaimed_bytes_from_dedup: `{reclaimed_dedup}` (`{human(reclaimed_dedup)}`)') if duplicate_groups:     for grp in duplicate_groups:         md_cleanup.append(f"- kept: `{grp['kept_path']}`")         md_cleanup.append(f"  size: `{grp['size_human']}`; removed `{len(grp['removed_paths'])}` duplicates; reclaimed `{grp['reclaimed_human']}`")         for rp in grp['removed_paths'][:20]:             md_cleanup.append(f"  removed: `{rp}`")         if len(grp['removed_paths']) > 20:             md_cleanup.append(f"  ... plus {len(grp['removed_paths']) - 20} more removed paths") else:     md_cleanup.append('- No duplicate groups with safe removals were found.') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Frozen Negative Asset Heavy Binary Cleanup') md_cleanup.append(f'- frozen_negative_asset_binary_cleanup_bytes: `{negative_cleanup_bytes}` (`{human(negative_cleanup_bytes)}`)') for p in negative_cleanup_paths:     md_cleanup.append(f'- removed heavy run dir: `{p}`') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Repo-Local Formal Dataset Duplicate Check') if repo_local_formal_dataset_duplicates:     for item in repo_local_formal_dataset_duplicates:         md_cleanup.append(f"- candidate: `{item['path']}` deleted={item['deleted']} reason={item['reason']}") else:     md_cleanup.append('- No repo-local duplicate of the formal external CALVIN `task_D_D` root was confirmed inside this repo.') md_cleanup.append(f'- reclaimed_bytes_from_dataset_duplicate_cleanup: `{reclaimed_dataset_dup}` (`{human(reclaimed_dataset_dup)}`)') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Archive Cleanup') md_cleanup.append(f'- reclaimed_bytes_from_archives: `{reclaimed_archives}` (`{human(reclaimed_archives)}`)') for p in archive_deleted:     md_cleanup.append(f'- deleted archive: `{p}`') md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Git Housekeeping') md_cleanup.append(f'- `.git` before: `{git_before_human}` ({git_before_bytes} bytes)') md_cleanup.append(f'- `.git` after: `{git_after_human}` ({git_after_bytes} bytes)') md_cleanup.append(f'- `.git/lfs` before: `{lfs_before_human}` ({lfs_before_bytes} bytes)') md_cleanup.append(f'- Large: Top 30') md_cleanup.append(md_table([     {'human': x['human'], 'bytes': x['bytes'], 'path': x['path']} for x in remaining_top30 ], ['human', 'bytes', 'path'])) md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Remaining Large Items Not Deleted') for item in remaining_large_items:     md_cleanup.append(f"- `{item['path']}`: `{item['human']}`. Reason: {item['reason']}") md_cleanup.append('') md_cleanup.append('## Next Best Cleanup Actions') for action in cleanup_json['next_best_cleanup_actions']:     md_cleanup.append(f'- {action}')  # Write files (storage_audit_path_json := logs_dir / 'egotrace_storage_audit_v1.json').write_text(json.dumps(storage_audit, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8') (storage_audit_path_md := reports_dir / 'egotrace_storage_audit_v1.md').write_text('\n'.join(md_audit) + '\n', encoding='utf-8') (cleanup_path_json := logs_dir / 'egotrace_storage_cleanup_v1.json').write_text(json.dumps(cleanup_json, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8') (cleanup_path_md := reports_dir / 'egotrace_storage_cleanup_v1.md').write_text('\n'.join(md_cleanup) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')  summary = {     'repo_before_bytes': repo_before_bytes,     'repo_after_bytes': repo_after_bytes,     'actual_reclaimed_bytes': actual_reclaimed_bytes,     'dedup_reclaimed_bytes': reclaimed_dedup,     'negative_cleanup_bytes': negative_cleanup_bytes,     'archive_cleanup_bytes': reclaimed_archives,     'safe_garbage_bytes': safe_deleted_bytes,     'git_housekeeping_bytes': reclaimed_git_housekeeping,     'duplicate_group_count': len(duplicate_groups),     'archive_deleted_count': len(archive_deleted),     'negative_cleanup_count': len(negative_cleanup_paths),     'safe_garbage_count': len(safe_deleted_paths), } print(json.dumps(summary, indent=2)) PY
